fld_description: Original ZooScan cruise code (YYYYMM + 2-letter ship code, e.g. '200507NH' = Jul 2005, R/V New Horizon); cruise_key + ship_key are parsed from it.
Local (PST) clock time of the tow (HH:MM).
Day or Night tow (by nautical twilight).
Lower-cased ZooScan bioclass name; FK target from zooscan_measurement.
Pivoted to long form: zooscan_abundance (No./m2), zooscan_biomass_carbon (mgC/m2), zooscan_feret_diameter (mm), zooscan_carbon_individual (ugC/individual).
